CVE-2019-17544.title: libaspell.a in GNU Aspell before 0.60.8 has a stack-based buffer  ...
CVE-2019-17544.description: libaspell.a in GNU Aspell before 0.60.8 has a stack-based buffer over-read in acommon::unescape in common/getdata.cpp via an isolated \ character.

CVE-2019-20433.title: libaspell.a in GNU Aspell before 0.60.8 has a buffer over-read fo ...
CVE-2019-20433.description: libaspell.a in GNU Aspell before 0.60.8 has a buffer over-read for a string ending with a single '\0' byte, if the encoding is set to ucs-2 or ucs-4 outside of the application, as demonstrated by the ASPELL_CONF environment variable.
